title: AmmoRaccoon caliber registry
description: Schema for calibers.json — the single source of truth for what a supported caliber is (expansion #3). The generator (ammoraccoon-web/scripts/gen-calibers) validates against this before emitting any artifact. Phase A values are verbatim transcriptions of the hand-maintained tables, quirks included: the duplicate '40sw' input alias, the loose scraper floor keys ('223'/'380'/'308' + the '556' twin row via floor_key_extra), and the per-surface display variants under display.overrides (accepted deviation D4).

detect_priority_py.description: Branch order of scraper_lib.normalize_caliber — first match wins. Differs from the JS order on purpose (accepted deviation D3); do NOT unify without a corpus-proven session.

detect_priority_js.description: Pattern order of lib/caliberDetect.js CALIBER_PATTERNS — first match wins.

market_bounds_order.description: Emission order for PER_CALIBER_FLOOR / PER_CALIBER_CEILING and the migration caliber_floors VALUES table — must stay in today's order for byte parity with migration 033.

home_groups.description: Hero caliber-picker group order + display names (app/HomeClient.js CALIBER_GROUPS). Groups with zero member calibers still render (disabled) — Shotgun today.

admin_categories.description: Admin dashboard anomaly categories (app/admin/.../page.js CALIBER_CATEGORIES) — member lists are kept VERBATIM (they include slugs that have no registry entry yet, e.g. 10mm/50bmg); a generator lint asserts every registry caliber's admin_category appears in the right list.

status.description: active: emitted into every table. staged: in the pipeline; emitted only where values/surface flags say (reproduces 45acp's half-seeded reality). planned: floors/admin pre-seeding only. ballistics-only: alias map only (44mag).

short.description: home picker / ammo-index / reloading label unless overridden

overrides.description: Per-surface variants kept verbatim for byte parity (D4). Remove only via an approved copy-unification change.

home.description: rank within the caliber's home_groups dropdown

color.description: HistoryClient CALIBER_COLORS. Required non-null when status=active (generator enforces).

surfaces.description: Staged-status surface flags reproducing today's half-seeded reality (45acp: in the home picker but not /history etc.).

input_aliases.description: ReloadingCalculator CALIBER_ALIASES, verbatim — 40sw's duplicate '40sw' entry is intentional (byte parity).

ballistics_aliases.description: UNION of the six ballistics scrapers' CALIBER_NORMALIZE keys mapping to this slug (accepted deviation D2 — behavior proven by dry-run replay, not byte-identical per-source maps).

url_aliases.description: Discovery (expansion #4, Stage 1): URL-fragment forms a retailer category link uses to name this caliber (e.g. '223-rem', '5-56', '556-nato'). Consumed ONLY by the discovery adapters + validation harness; NOT by normalize_caliber/detection, so it cannot change a product-title verdict. Seeded from observed retailer category slugs + the TSUSA sitemap WANT dict. Each entry must be lowercase and globally unique across calibers (generator lint). Optional — calibers with no observed retailer slugs yet (staged/planned) omit it.

floor_key.description: Loose key used by scraper_lib CALIBER_PRICE_FLOORS/_CEILINGS ('223', '380', '308'…). Kept verbatim for parity; collapse post-cutover.

floor_key_extra.description: Extra loose rows sharing this caliber's bounds (the '556' twin).

scrape_ceiling.description: null = caliber absent from CALIBER_PRICE_CEILINGS (45acp today) — DEFAULT_CEILING applies at runtime.
